result.position: Do not certify yet on the visible record. Certification should be conditional on replayable retained projected Codex custom-agent transport proof, and the current slice only defines the evidence standard rather than demonstrating that the retained artifacts satisfy it.
result.openQuestion: Whether the retained artifact bundle actually contains the required projected names, hashes, raw waits, normalized collection, WAL, trace, evidence, and validator pass outputs.

content.summary: No P0 blocker is proven by the visible slice, but sufficiency is also not proven. Missing or non-replayable retained projected transport evidence would be a P0 blocker before v0.3 certification.
